events.name: TSG Hoffenheim at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Bayern Munich extended their perfect Bundesliga start when Michael Olise scored two goals and set up two more against Werder Bremen.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rampant Bayern score 20th goal in three games

video.headline: Bayern stay hot in 5-0 thumping of Werder Bremen
